introSection:
Green Scream is a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. It was new to the park in 1998.

On 8 August 2010, the record for "most naked riders on a roller coaster" took place on the Green Scream raising £22,000 for charity. A total of 102 people took part, beating the previous record of 32 on Nemesis at Alton Towers. A second attempt took place on 24 October 2015 with 122 people, but was not recognised by Guinness World Records.
fullText:
Green Scream is a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. It was new to the park in 1998.

On 8 August 2010, the record for "most naked riders on a roller coaster" took place on the Green Scream raising £22,000 for charity. A total of 102 people took part, beating the previous record of 32 on Nemesis at Alton Towers. A second attempt took place on 24 October 2015 with 122 people, but was not recognised by Guinness World Records.



Green track and supports.
